title: Calgara Draws His Spear
description: The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Noland, Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villager. The flashback shows how Shandora was torn away into the sky, leaving Noland and Calgara’s promise unresolved for centuries.

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: What're you running so desperately for?

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Father! Please go and call them back!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: What!? Don't you realize what they've-

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: This may sound like just an excuse,

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Its because our admiral knows well,
